summary: Iteration 19 - Testing of 4 new OEC Tech LMS features: 1) Full course edit with all fields, 2) Course outline assignments with file_url, 3) Manual student add via admin, 4) Branded PDF header/footer. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright. Fixed backend bug: Added missing file_url field to Assignment model.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns session_token
Backend: GET /api/admin/courses returns course list
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/{id} accepts category, short_description, description, requirements[], what_you_will_learn[]
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/{id} category-only update works
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/{id}/outline accepts assignment with file_url field
Backend: POST /api/admin/admission-forms/manual creates student with auto-generated student_id (OEC-YYYY-XXXX format)
Backend: POST /api/admin/admission-forms/manual validates required full_name field
Backend: POST /api/admin/admission-forms/manual requires admin auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/admission-forms returns forms with student_id field
Backend: GET /api/courses (public) returns courses
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns stats
Backend: GET /api/admin/staff returns staff list
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks returns tracks
Frontend: Admin Course Edit modal has Category dropdown (#ed-cat)
Frontend: Admin Course Edit modal has Short Description field (#ed-short)
Frontend: Admin Course Edit modal has Full Description textarea (#ed-desc)
Frontend: Admin Course Edit modal has Requirements textarea (#ed-req)
Frontend: Admin Course Edit modal has What You'll Learn textarea (#ed-learn)
Frontend: Course Outline editor has Assignment section per week
Frontend: Course Outline editor has file_url field for assignment downloads
Frontend: Admin Admissions page has Add Student button (data-testid='add-student-btn')
Frontend: Add Student modal has all required fields (Full Name, Phone, DOB, Gender, City, Session, Learning Type, Course, Father Name, Father Phone, Father CNIC)
Frontend: Admin Admissions page shows Student IDs as gold badges (OEC-2026-XXXX format)
Frontend: Admin Admissions page has Download PDF button on each form
Frontend: Student PDF has branded header (OEC TECH INSTITUTE - CHUNIAN, logo, Student ID)
Frontend: Student PDF has branded footer (info@oectechs.com | 0300-0517616 | www.oectechs.com | Founder/CEO: Sadam Zargar)
Frontend: Staff PDF uses same branded template
Frontend: Diploma PDF uses same branded template
Frontend: Public courses page loads correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test student 'TEST_Manual Student Iter19' via manual add endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified all 4 new features: 1) Full Course Edit - Category dropdown, Short Description, Full Description, Requirements (one per line), What You'll Learn (one per line) all working in edit modal. 2) Course Outline Assignments - Assignment section per week with file_url field for student downloads. 3) Manual Student Add - POST /api/admin/admission-forms/manual creates student with auto-generated OEC-YYYY-XXXX student_id. 4) Branded PDF - All PDFs (Student, Staff, Diploma) use shared pdfTemplate.js with OEC TECH INSTITUTE - CHUNIAN header, graduation cap logo, and footer with contact info + Founder/CEO: Sadam Zargar. Fixed bug: Added missing file_url field to Assignment model in models.py. Email notifications remain MOCKED.

mocked_apis_list: Email sending mocked (logs to console instead of sending real emails)

full_course_edit.ui_elements: Edit modal with all fields, Category dropdown with 6 options (Technology, Design, Marketing, E-Commerce, Web Development, Business)

course_outline_assignments.ui_elements: Outline modal with Add/Remove Assignment buttons, file URL input with helper text

manual_student_add.ui_elements: Add Student button, modal with all fields, Parent/Guardian section

branded_pdf.header: OEC TECH INSTITUTE - CHUNIAN with graduation cap logo (gold on dark background)
branded_pdf.shared_template: pdfTemplate.js used by Student, Staff, and Diploma PDFs

bug_fixed.impact: Course outline assignments can now store file URLs for student downloads
